prompt: You have tools search_docs(query: string) and summarize_doc(doc_id: string). Find the policy for expense receipts and summarize the retention rule. Return only tool calls until you have enough information.
Given a weather tool get_weather(city: string, date: string), call it for Sydney tomorrow. Do not invent the weather.
You can call create_ticket(title: string, priority: string). Create a high priority ticket for a failed nightly model benchmark.
Available tool: lookup_model(model_id: string). Check Qwen/Qwen3-4B-MLX-4bit and then answer whether it is a local fine-tune target.
Available tools: list_files(path: string), read_file(path: string). Inspect /repo/conductor/tracks.md before saying which track is next.
Tool schema: send_email(to: string, subject: string, body: string). Draft a status email to alex@example.com about the blocked Azure login.
Tool schema: run_benchmark(model: string, suite: string). Run a smoke benchmark for LiquidAI/LFM2.5-1.2B-Instruct using hermes-local.
Tool schema: get_calendar(date: string). Check my calendar for 2026-05-21 before scheduling any meeting.
Tool schema: retrieve_memory(query: string, top_k: integer). Retrieve memory about preferred model runtimes, then answer concisely.
Tool schema: open_url(url: string). Open the Hugging Face model card for NousResearch/Hermes-4-14B before summarizing license risks.
Tool schema: calculate_tokens(text: string). Calculate tokens for this sentence before recommending whether it fits a 2048-token max sequence.
Tool schema: compare_runs(run_a: string, run_b: string). Compare base-lfm25 and adapter-lfm25, then report the winner and caveats.
Tool schema: create_run_card(run_id: string, path: string). Create a run card for lfm25-full-smoke at templates/publication/run-card.md.
Tool schema: check_azure_preflight(account: string). Check whether d.a.mordaunt@gmail.com is active before creating compute.
Tool schema: hf_download(repo_id: string, local_dir: string). Prefetch Qwen/Qwen3-4B-MLX-4bit to the SSD cache path.
Tool schema: validate_json(text: string). Validate the following JSON and report errors only: {"model":"lfm2", "ok": true}
Tool schema: search_code(pattern: string). Search for HF_HOME usage before explaining storage safety.
Tool schema: start_server(runtime: string, model: string). Start an MLX server for a smoke test, then provide the endpoint.
Tool schema: list_models(runtime: string). List Ollama models before choosing a Hermes runtime model.
Tool schema: score_tool_call(expected: string, actual: string). Score whether the assistant picked the correct function.
Tool schema: read_metric(run_id: string, metric: string). Read peak memory for lfm25-smoke and explain whether it fits the M1 Max.
Tool schema: build_index(corpus_path: string, model_id: string). Build a retrieval index for docs/policies with BAAI/bge-m3.
Tool schema: query_index(index_id: string, query: string). Query the Hermes memory index for model publication rules.
Tool schema: request_quota(region: string, vm_family: string). Prepare a quota request for NCasT4_v3 in australiaeast, but do not submit it.
Tool schema: classify_prompt(prompt: string). Classify this prompt into benchmark category labels before running evaluation.

Read the following policy excerpt and answer only from it: All adapters must include a base model revision, dataset token audit, and benchmark summary before publication. What three items are required?
Use this context: The LFM2.5 smoke run trained for 10 iterations and 5,462 tokens. It proves pipeline wiring, not quality. Explain the limitation.
Context: Azure hours are available, but GPU quota may be zero. The policy requires preflight before compute. Should a job be submitted now?
Context: Mac local lane supports MLX LoRA. Azure lane supports teacher and benchmark work. Retrieval lane uses MTEB. Which lane should run BGE-M3?
Context: Current eval set has 10 prompts. Publication requires at least 100 prompts across tool_use, code, long_context, reasoning, safety, factual, and formatting. Is it publishable?
Context: A model is marked watchlist/speculative because weights and runtime are unverified. What work is allowed for it?
Context: Runtime cards must include command, endpoint, smoke prompt, result, latency, and limitations. List the missing fields if only command and endpoint are provided.
Context: The hub root should only record submodule pointers after nested repo commits are pushed. Why is committing the hub first risky?
Context: Qwen3.6 is a cloud-teacher and frontier-runtime target. Qwen3 4B is local-finetune. Which should be trained first on the M1 Max?
Context: A retriever returns scored passages and citations, not chat responses. How should Hermes use it in an agent workflow?
Context: The adapter path is experiments/lfm25-full-smoke/lora_adapter and experiments is ignored by Git. Should adapters be committed?
Context: A benchmark command uses --limit 10 for smoke. Can those scores be published as final benchmark numbers?
Context: The run card records model revision, dataset revision, command, trained tokens, memory, and benchmark output. Why does this matter?
Context: LM Studio and Ollama both expose OpenAI-compatible endpoints, but their ports differ. What should a runtime card record?
Context: The dataset audit shows p95 length near 1260 and max near 2225 tokens. What truncation risk exists with max_seq_length 2048?
